full_text:
We received two small pieces of Fallopian tube in sterile HBSS:

Anniina scraped the tissue inside the tube using a sterile scalpel, while keeping the tissues on a 10 cm plate in 2 ml of HBSS.

The goal was to cut off the internal part with epithelial cells, and avoid connective and vascular tissue. The scraped pieces were the size of 1cm*3 mm, and 0.5 cm*2 mm approximately.

Assel Kamelnova performed rest of the steps

Scrapped material was transferred to 15 mL Falcon tube. Centrifuged for 3 min at 25 C, 300 G

Aspirated SN. As the pellet was red, added 2 ml of RBC lysis buffer, and after 5 min added 10 mL of Progenitor Isolation medium for FT

Centrifuged for 3 min at 25 C, 300 G

I aspirated SN, and resuspended the cells in 1 mL of Progenitor Isolation medium for FT and counted the cells

Dissociated cells:

Cell count/ml 1):

total: 4.97 E5

live: 3.04 E5

viability: 61.2 %

size: 15.8 um

Cell count /ml 2):

total: 4.6 E5

live: 3.82 E5

viability: 83 %

size: 16.8 um

Total cell count: 4.79 E5

Total volume: 1 mL

Overall # of cells in 1 mL was 4.79 E5.

I transferred 1 mL with cells from falcon tube to 10 cm Petri dish, added 9 mL more of Progenitor Isolation medium for FT, and put to 37 C incubator.

Progenitor Isolation Medium prep:
